title: Potential memory leak in sqlite3_bind_text()
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, age INTEGER, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE age > (SELECT AVG(age) FROM test_table);
UPDATE test_table SET name = 'Bob' WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name IS NULL);
